jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at PharmEasy
jsonLd.description:
PharmEasy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About PharmEasy:
PharmEasy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy!
